item.author: @elonmusk

item.title: turning on the lights < turning on Binance https://t.co/5Q4E8C53k9
item.author: @binance

item.title: What if your agent could write you a song, sing as your AI companion, and curate a playlist from you...
item.description:
What if your agent could write you a song, sing as your AI companion, and curate a playlist from your library natively?
🎶Today we're open-sourcing three Music Skills:
minimax-music-gen: one-line prompt to full track. Agent auto-picks original, instrumental, or cover.
buddy-sings: your Claude Code character reads its own persona and sings in first person.
minimax-music-playlist: agent scans your local music, learns your taste, builds your playlist.
All three are tuned to run natively in MMX-CLI alongside Music 2.6 and the rest of our multimodal models. Connect a MiniMax Token Plan, add MMX-CLI, and your agent picks up the Skills on its own.
Start here👉https://t.co/UEmNvPwChs
--- @MiniMax_AI | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 1 | 💬 0 | 👁 359
item.author: @MiniMax_AI
